title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 180 NE 2nd Street Suite 23 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 567-3113 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-3113 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC
